posts.title: Just completely revamped my Neovim config, and it feels like a superpower 🚀
posts.excerpt: After years of using VS Code, I finally took the plunge and configured Neovim from scratch. The speed and efficiency are just unmatched. Anyone else here a terminal editor convert?
posts.author: terminal_junkie

posts.title: Looking for advice: Transitioning from Data Analyst to Data Engineer
posts.excerpt: I've been working as a Data Analyst for 3 years, mostly using SQL, Python (Pandas), and Tableau. I want to move into Data Engineering. What should I focus on learning next? Spark? Airflow? Cloud infra?
posts.author: data_diver

posts.title: Is Tailwind CSS really better than writing custom CSS?
posts.excerpt: I'm starting a new Next.js project and my team is divided. Half wants to use Tailwind, the other half wants SCSS modules. What are the long-term pros and cons of going all-in on Tailwind for a large codebase?
posts.author: css_purist_99

posts.title: The importance of writing good commit messages 📝
posts.excerpt: Please, for the love of all that is holy, stop writing 'fixed bug' or 'updates'. Your future self and your teammates will thank you for taking an extra 30 seconds to explain WHY a change was made.
posts.author: git_gud

posts.title: Rust vs Go for a new microservice architecture?
posts.excerpt: We are breaking down our monolith. We have heavy concurrent loads and need high performance. I love Rust's safety, but Go's concurrency model (goroutines) seems much easier to manage. Thoughts?
posts.author: architect_bob

posts.title: Show DevHive: I built an open-source alternative to Postman
posts.excerpt: Hey everyone! I got tired of Postman becoming increasingly bloated and cloud-dependent, so I built a lightweight, fully offline, open-source API client using Tauri and React. Would love some feedback!
posts.author: open_sourcerer

posts.title: What's the most obscure bug you've ever had to track down?
posts.excerpt: I once spent 3 days debugging an issue that only happened on Tuesdays. Turns out, a cron job timezone wasn't set correctly and it drifted across the dateline. What's your horror story?
posts.author: bug_hunter_supreme

posts.title: Best co-working spaces in Rabat for software engineers?
posts.excerpt: Working from home is getting a bit lonely. Can anyone recommend some good co-working spaces in Rabat with reliable fiber optics and good coffee?
posts.author: mehdi_backend
